name: Perfect Webinar Shortcut (Facebook/Instagram Live Funnel)
origin: Rapid-fire version of the Perfect Webinar delivered live on Facebook/Instagram with no slides — just a whiteboard, origin story, ONE secret, and the close. Can be created in ~15 minutes and promoted as a paid ad. Kaelin Poulin generated $650,000 from a single session.

whenToUse.summary: Use to run a fast, slide-less Perfect Webinar live on Facebook/Instagram (whiteboard + origin story + one secret + close), then retarget viewers and route warm traffic straight to an order page.
goals: Sell fast without building a full slide deck or webinar tech
Use a live FB/IG session as both content and paid-ad creative
Retarget viewers and convert warm traffic on an order page
signals: Client wants speed (build in ~15 min) over polish
Comfortable going live on FB/IG with a whiteboard
Has a paid-ads budget to boost/retarget the session
Single clear offer with one core belief to break
antiSignals: Offer needs 3 full belief breaks + slides (use Webinar)
Audience won't watch social live (use AutoWebinar/VSL)

pageStructure.purpose: Announce the FB/IG Live and collect RSVPs / drive viewers to the live.
keyElements: 'What you'll learn in this quick session' (the one secret tease)

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the rapid Perfect Webinar Shortcut natively on the platform.
keyElements: ONE secret (the single most important belief break)
The close + a clear 'go here to get it' CTA to the order page
Live comments engagement (drives the algorithm + retargeting audience)
skill44Widgets: (Native platform — no GHL page) link-out CTA tracked via UTM/redirect

pageStructure.purpose: Capture viewers from the live and route them onward; feed retargeting ads.
keyElements: 'Watched the live? Get the offer / replay here'
Short bridge recap (one secret + offer tease)

scripts: Live session = Perfect Webinar Shortcut (origin story + ONE secret + close) — no slides, whiteboard only
Setup-page headline, ad copy, bridge recap, order urgency = Copywriting Secrets
copyFramework.notes: Only ONE secret (not three) — pick the single biggest false belief. Speed and authenticity beat polish; the raw live IS the ad creative.

ghlBuild.funnelType: Light funnel (1-2 GHL pages) + FB/IG live + retargeting ads
automations: Viewer pixel → retargeting ad audience → bridge/order page
ghlBuild.notes: The live itself runs on Facebook/Instagram (not a GHL page). Skill 6 builds the lightweight setup/bridge/order pages and the tracking pixel; Skill 44 generates the RSVP form, the order form + bump, and the countdown. Most of the engine is the retargeting ad flow.
